seoTitle: Hartwood vs Hartys Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hartwood and Hartys Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hartwood vs Hartys Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hartwood and Hartys Plains.
heading: Hartwood vs Hartys Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hartwood, New South Wales and Hartys Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hartwood has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Hartys Plains (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hartwood or Hartys Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hartwood has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Hartys Plains scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hartwood scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Hartys Plains scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hartwood or Hartys Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hartwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
